case_title: CORAZON SANTOS et al VS. FREDDIE HERNANDEZ et al

docket_entries.description: ARBITRATOR JOHN NYE GULICK APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION APR-08-2003 THROUGH JUL-07-2003.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-04-2003 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR MAR-24-2003. PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAY-05-2003 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. JAN-24-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ATTORNEY FITZGERALD, WILLIAM FRANCIS
CORRESPONDENCE, PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY, BRUCE J. LEVITZ TO ARBITRATOR TO DEFENSE COUNSEL; ARB. HRG. DATE RESCHEDULED TO MAY 27, 2003 @ 3:30 PM
STIPULATION FOR SETTLEMENT OF ENTIRE ACTION FILED BY SANTOS, CORAZON SANTOS, FRANCISCO HERNANDEZ, FREDDIE ADVANCED DELIVERY SYSTEMS
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE APR-03-2003.
REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR MAY-05-2003 - CASE SETTLED. ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 212 ON JUL-15-2003 AT 10:00 AM FOR DISMISSAL PER CRC 225.
CRC 225 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-15-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANTOS, CORAZON SANTOS, FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, FREDDIE ADVANCED DELIVERY SYSTEMS DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-24-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-22-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-09-2003
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, FREDDIE ADVANCED DELIVERY SYSTEMS
PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR JOHN GRAVES.
CORRESPONDENCE, ARBITRATOR, JOHN N. GULICK, JR. TO COUNSEL; ARBITRATION HEARING DATE: JUNE 19, 2003 @ 3:30 PM
FAX FROM PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY, BRUCE J. LEVITZ TO ARBITRATOR, JOHN N. GULICK TO DEFENSE COUNSEL; ARBITRATION HRG. DATE RESCHEDULED TO MAY 27, 2003 @ 3:30 PM
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-04-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS & COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANTOS, CORAZON SANTOS, FRANCISCO SERVED SEP-12-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ADVANCED DELIVERY SYSTEMS
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
